content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for all tours that start with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with tables `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in the export:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   Use file path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for all tours that start with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with tables `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   - Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   - Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09C`.
   Use exactly these column names in the export:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached.
   Use file path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", jt.HAUS AS "HAUS", jt.ANLAGE AS "ANLAGE", jt.ME_MA_ID AS "ME_MA_ID", jt.EQUNR AS "EQUNR", jt.HOUSE_NUM1 AS "HOUSE_NUM1", jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS "ENTSCHEIDUNG", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS "TITLE", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS "FORENAME", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS "SURNAME", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS "STREET", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS "STREETNO", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS "POST_CODE1", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS "CITY1", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS "CITY2", CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREET,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'' ) || COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'' )) <> '' THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS "EMAIL" FROM J09C_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg ON jt.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR

args.email: Please find attached the J09C meter reading export CSV.
